title: Take note and talk to your friend

lines.speaker: A
lines.text:
What do you do in the morning?
What do you do in the afternoon?
What do you do in the evening?
What do you do at night?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text:
First, in the morning, ____.
Then, ____.
In the afternoon, ____.
After that, ____.
In the evening, ____.
Finally, at night, ____.
